economic_notes: Nation operates forestry, construction, gas bar, and development businesses through partnerships and corporations. COVID-19 noted as subsequent event with uncertain impact. Pension plan contributions totalled $431,607.
notes: Fiscal year 2020. Two fully consolidated subsidiaries: Seabird Education Society and Seabird Island Holdings Ltd. Seven business entities accounted for by modified equity method including forestry, construction, gas bar and development partnerships. CMHC restricted cash of $1,305,015 included in cash. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($13,111,860) + First Nation Health Authority ($4,790,254) + Province of BC ($3,916,257) + FNESC ($1,469,432) + Other federal ($1,136,916) + Sto:lo Nation ($512,089) + CMHC ($288,808) = $25,225,616; OSR = total revenue minus government transfers. Capital lease obligations of $22,551 excluded from long-term debt figure shown. Remuneration schedule not included in provided text. Schedule 3 onward was truncated in the document provided.
